meta.description: Location and population of urban settlements through time, for the time-machine Earth layer. Cities appear at their earliest recorded population estimate and grow/shrink over time.

source.title: Spatializing 6,000 years of global urbanization from 3700 BC to AD 2000
source.authors: Reba, M.; Reitsma, F.; Seto, K. C.

meta.attribution: Historical city data: Reba, Reitsma & Seto (2016), Scientific Data 3:160034, DOI 10.1038/sdata.2016.34, CC BY 4.0.
meta.year_convention: signed integer year; negative = BC, positive = AD. There is no year 0.
